description: An invoice for a utility bill (e.g., electricity) has been received. These invoices do not have purchase orders.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly extracts vendor, invoice number, amount, and due date.

nodes.task_description: Code the invoice to the correct general ledger account (e.g., 'Utilities Expense') and cost center.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly assigns the GL code '64500-Utilities' and the 'Facilities' cost center.

nodes.task_description: Route the invoice to the appropriate department head for approval.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the invoice to the Facilities Manager for electronic approval.
